prompts: A woman in her late 20s with bright red curly hair, freckled cheeks, and green eyes, wearing a yellow raincoat, waves at the camera on a wooden dock by a misty lake, then turns and walks away along the dock, getting smaller and smaller until she disappears into the thick fog and is completely out of sight. Soft morning light, medium shot.

The wooden dock stretches out over the misty lake, completely empty. Gentle ripples on the still water, distant pine trees fading into fog, a pair of ducks gliding across the surface. No people anywhere. The camera lingers on the quiet scene. Soft morning light, medium shot.

The same woman with bright red curly hair, freckled cheeks, green eyes, and yellow raincoat reappears from the fog in the distance, walking back along the wooden dock toward the camera, waving again. She is the same person who walked away earlier. The misty lake and pine trees are behind her. Soft morning light, medium shot.

A man in his 40s with a short black beard and warm brown eyes, wearing a navy peacoat and grey scarf, stands on a rain-slicked city sidewalk holding a red umbrella, then turns and walks away from the camera down the sidewalk, his figure shrinking until he vanishes into the crowd and is completely out of sight. Yellow taxis and neon signs reflect on the wet pavement. Evening light, medium shot.

A rain-slicked city sidewalk at night, completely empty in the foreground. Puddles reflect neon signs and passing yellow taxis. A closed red umbrella leans against a lamppost. No people in the foreground. The camera holds on the quiet rainy street. Evening light, medium shot.

The same man with a short black beard, warm brown eyes, navy peacoat, and grey scarf walks back into view on the rain-slicked city sidewalk, approaching the camera from the distance. He is the same person who walked away earlier. He picks up the red umbrella from the lamppost. Yellow taxis and neon signs reflect on the wet pavement. Evening light, medium shot.

A young woman in her early 20s with straight black hair in a high ponytail, wearing a bright orange hiking jacket and carrying a green backpack, stands on a mountain trail, then turns and hikes away from the camera along the trail toward the distant snow-capped peaks, getting smaller and smaller until she is completely out of sight behind a bend. Golden hour light, medium shot.

A mountain trail winding through wildflower meadows with snow-capped peaks in the distance. The trail is completely empty with no hikers. Wildflowers sway in the breeze and a marmot sits on a rock. The camera lingers on the peaceful empty landscape. Golden hour light, medium shot.

The same young woman with straight black hair in a high ponytail, bright orange hiking jacket, and green backpack reappears on the mountain trail, walking toward the camera from behind the bend. She is the same person who hiked away earlier. Snow-capped peaks and wildflower meadows stretch behind her. Golden hour light, medium shot.

An elderly man in his 70s with thick white hair, round glasses, and a weathered face, wearing a beige linen shirt, pushes back from a wooden cafe table in a rustic Italian piazza, stands up, and walks away across the cobblestones toward the stone fountain, getting farther and farther until he is completely out of sight around a corner. Warm golden hour light, medium shot.

A rustic Italian piazza with an empty wooden cafe table in the foreground. The stone fountain splashes gently, ivy hangs from old walls, pigeons peck at cobblestones, and a waiter wipes a nearby table. No one sits at the foreground table. The camera lingers on the empty scene. Warm golden hour light, medium shot.

The same elderly man with thick white hair, round glasses, weathered face, and beige linen shirt walks back across the cobblestone piazza toward the wooden cafe table. He is the same person who walked away earlier. He sits down and faces the camera with a warm smile. The stone fountain with ivy is behind him. Warm golden hour light, medium close-up.

A young boy around 10 years old with messy brown hair and a gap-toothed grin, wearing a red-and-white striped shirt, rides a blue bicycle along a tree-lined suburban street, then pedals away from the camera down the street, getting smaller and smaller until he disappears around a far corner and is completely out of sight. Dappled afternoon sunlight, medium shot.

A quiet tree-lined suburban street with no one on it. Dappled sunlight filters through maple leaves onto the empty sidewalk. A blue bicycle leans against a white picket fence. Birds chirp. The camera lingers on the peaceful empty street. Afternoon light, medium shot.

The same young boy with messy brown hair, gap-toothed grin, and red-and-white striped shirt runs back into view along the tree-lined suburban street toward the camera. He is the same boy who rode away earlier. He hops on the blue bicycle leaning against the fence and rides toward the camera. Dappled afternoon sunlight, medium shot.

A woman in her 30s with shoulder-length auburn hair and bright blue eyes, wearing a white sundress and straw hat, stands in a sunflower field, then turns and walks away from the camera deeper into the tall sunflowers, getting smaller and smaller until she is completely hidden and out of sight among the blooms. Clear blue sky. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A vast sunflower field under a clear blue sky. Tall sunflowers sway gently in the breeze, bees move between blooms, and a straw hat rests on top of one sunflower. No person visible anywhere. The camera lingers on the empty sunflower field. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

The same woman with shoulder-length auburn hair, bright blue eyes, and white sundress emerges from among the tall sunflowers, walking toward the camera. She is the same person who walked away earlier. She reaches for the straw hat resting on a sunflower. Clear blue sky. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.
